name: Feedback Form Injection
description: A customer feedback form inserts user input directly into an INSERT statement. Exploit it to extract the flag from a restricted table.
briefing: GlowBox, a subscription box company, has a feedback form that stores submissions in a database. The form appears to directly insert user-supplied values into an INSERT statement. Since the submitted feedback is displayed back on a 'thank you' page, you can inject subqueries into the INSERT values to read data from other tables. An 'internal_keys' table reportedly contains the flag.
objective: Exploit the INSERT statement injection to extract the flag from the internal_keys table via the feedback display page.
author: h4ck0rman
